title: Alcicornium stemaria
taxonomy: Alcicornium stemaria is classified as an orchid species, specifically within the genus Alcicornium. This genus is part of the family Orchidaceae, which comprises over 30,000 species of orchids worldwide. The classification of Alcicornium stemaria further breaks down into the subfamily Epidendroideae, which is one of the largest subfamilies within Orchidaceae. Alcicornium stemaria is native to Australia, where its specific classification and distribution provide insight into the unique characteristics of this orchid species. Its classification highlights the diverse range of orchid species found in Australia and the importance of continued research into these species.
